title: Identify the required cell for a domain crossing
description: Given the source and destination power state and voltage, decide whether isolation, level shifting, or both are needed.
body: Use when checking a signal that crosses between power or voltage domains. Do not place a single cell type by habit, since the right cell depends on both power state and voltage difference. Actions: compare the two domains' power states and voltages, choose isolation for a power-down crossing and a level shifter for a voltage crossing, and verify the power-intent declares it. Validation signals include the chosen cell matching the crossing condition and the power-intent file accepting it. Risk boundary: a wrong or missing cell leaves the crossing unprotected, so flag any crossing whose declared cell does not match its conditions.
